evals.prompt: Run the full loom pipeline for Citizens Bank. Here are the discovery notes.
evals.expected_output: Complete workspace with all 7 stages executed. Handoff summary with artifact list, platform status, before-you-build tasks, and send-to-customer callout.
assertions: Inventory report shown before execution begins
Each stage announced with emoji status indicator before and after
All 7 output files produced (discovery through checklist)
ML designer skipped (no ML scenes in Citizens Bank script)
Handoff summary present with artifact table, platform status, and before-you-build list
Confirmation doc flagged as 'send to customer'
No stage re-run that could be skipped (discovery JSON already exists)

evals.prompt: Build the demo for Deutsche Telekom SOC-T — I have the diagnostic. They want ML anomaly detection and ES|QL. No discovery notes, just the diagnostic.
evals.expected_output: Partial pipeline — diagnostic analyzer + platform audit only. Orchestrator correctly identifies that discovery notes are missing and reports what's blocked downstream. Does not produce a script or data model without discovery context.
assertions: Diagnostic analyzer stage runs (current-state exists — skipped if already present)
Platform audit runs in partial mode (no discovery JSON)
Script template does NOT run (no discovery context)
Handoff clearly states what's missing and what to do next
Orchestrator does not hallucinate a script from diagnostic data alone

evals.prompt: The Citizens Bank demo script needs to change — Joe Burke is joining the call after all. Rewrite the script and give me a fresh checklist.
evals.expected_output: Only weave-script and finish-check re-run. All other Citizens Bank artifacts left unchanged. Script updated to account for Joe Burke (decision maker now present — adds executive framing). Fresh checklist generated.
assertions: Only script-template and validator stages run — data model not regenerated
Inventory report shows other stages as already complete / skipped
Updated script addresses Joe Burke as a decision maker in the room
Script runtime expands to accommodate executive framing (likely 40+ min vs 33)
Checklist regenerated and reflects updated script
Handoff summary notes what changed vs previous run
